title: Smoky Atered Polish Anchovy Casserole
description: A hearty, smoky Polish casserole featuring al dente pasta, crispy anchovy fillets, and a crunchy breadcrumb topping. Serve hot with a side of steamed vegetables.
instructions: Cook linguine according to package instructions until al dente. Drain and set aside.
In a large skillet, sauté chopped onion until softened. Add chopped anchovy fillets and cook for 2-3 minutes. Stir in caraway seeds, flour, and smoked paprika. Cook for 1 minute, then set aside.
In a large mixing bowl, combine cooked linguine, anchovy mixture, and 2 tablespoons of butter. Mix well to combine.
Transfer linguine mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish and top with bread crumbs and parmesan cheese.
Dot top of casserole with remaining 2 tablespoons of butter.
Bake in preheated oven for 20-25 minutes, or until golden brown and crispy on top.
Remove from oven and let cool for 5-10 minutes before serving.
